channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Why CX is every brand’s biggest opportunity
item.description: The Fast Company Impact Council is a private membership community of influential leaders, experts, executives, and entrepreneurs who share their insights with our audience. Members pay annual membership dues for access to peer learning and thought leadership opportunities, events and more.
item.dc:creator: John Sabino, Fast Company

item.title: AI hallucinations could get lawyers fired, law firm says
item.description: U.S. personal injury law firm Morgan & Morgan sent an urgent email this month to its more than 1,000 lawyers: Artificial intelligence can invent fake case law, and using made-up information in a court filing could get you fired.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: DeepSeek accused of sharing user data with TikTok owner ByteDance
item.description: "We confirmed DeepSeek communicating with ByteDance," a South Korean data protection regulator told Yonhap News Agency.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: More than 150 false killer whales stranded on a beach in Australia's Tasmania state
item.description: More than 150 false killer whales are stranded on a remote beach on Australia’s island state of Tasmania.
item.dc:creator: Rod Mcguirk, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: OVHcloud US: Addressing businesses’ complete cloud needs
item.description: Based in Reston, Virginia, OVHcloud US is a wholly owned subsidiary of OVH Cloud, Europe’s leading cloud provider.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Federal workers fired by Elon Musk’s DOGE are sharing their anxieties on Reddit
item.description: Elon Musk’s aggressive push to cut government spending reached new heights on Valentine’s Day, as employees across more than two dozen federal government departments were abruptly fired on Valentine’s Day—with those let go warning it could impact how the government operates.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: An obscure French startup just launched the cheapest true 5K monitor in the world right now and I can't wait to test it
item.description: JapanNext challenges the market with an affordable 5K monitor, delivering high resolution and color accuracy at a low price point.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What is Y Combinator now? Critics say the famed accelerator is having an identity crisis
item.description: In December, Y Combinator’s first-ever Fall batch got their own Demo Day. The Silicon Valley-based startup accelerator—which has produced big hits like Airbnb, Doordash, and Stripe—had doubled the number of startup classes that could enter its program.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Sea turtles return to the Atlantic Ocean off Florida after being stunned by the cold
item.description: Eight green sea turtles stunned by the cold during a rare snowfall in Florida have been released back into the Atlantic Ocean.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bay Area job market sickened due to COVID has yet to recover
item.description: The Bay Area job market, an engine for California's economy, has sputtered badly in the wake of the coronavirus outbreak.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Burchett compares DOGE staffers to young WWII soldiers
item.description: Rep. Tim Burchett (R-Tenn.) on Monday compared Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) staffers to young World War II soldiers. Burchett was pressed by CNN’s Pamela Brown on DOGE’s reported attempt to enter an IRS system, as well as its overall access to data.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: ExpressVPN's Aircove becomes the first device equipped with Lightway 2.0 – and the upgrades don't stop there
item.description: ExpressVPN's VPN router now promises to be faster, more private, and more secure. Here's all you need to know about the AircoveOS v5 update.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: McIntosh's gorgeous DS200 streaming DAC is here, thus completing the nonpareil hi-fi system of my dreams
item.description: When McIntosh releases a hi-fi separate, I typically stop what I'm doing and take a look –and this one could grace pretty much any setup you care to imagine.
item.dc:creator: becky.scarrott@futurenet.com (Becky Scarrott), TechRadar

item.title: US utility giant says MOVEit hack exposed stolen data
item.description: PLL Electric Utilities data stolen in May 2023 have now been released on the internet, including customer names and more.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Strategies for telecom executives: navigating the OPEX conundrum
item.description: As the market becomes increasingly competitive and technology evolves rapidly, telecommunications industry leaders must find ways to achieve more with less — managing operating expenses (OPEX) without sacrificing critical capabilities.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: One Redditor spotted an AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D for $99 in the wildest price drop I've ever seen
item.description: It might be a bit of a head-scratcher at first, but yes, AMD's Ryzen 7 7800X3D was recently available for $99 at one retail store.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Want to transform networking? Empower the missing users
item.description: As 2025 kicked off, I wrote a column about the network vendor landscape – specifically, which networking players will step up and put their efforts into finding new applications with solid business benefits that could enable a network transformation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: White House says Elon Musk is not part of DOGE
item.description: The White House said Monday that Elon Musk is technically not part of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), even though the tech billionaire is said to be leading its sweeping cost-cutting efforts.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Apple Customizes TV Logo for Each MLS Team Ahead of 30th Season - MLS Season Pass Now Available on Apple TV
item.description: The 30 teams in Major League Soccer are getting a custom Apple TV patch to celebrate the league's 30th season. Apple is streaming every game with no blackouts via an MLS Season Pass subscription on Apple TV.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Ubisoft announces Rainbow Six Siege X, 'the biggest transformation' the tactical shooter has ever seen that will overhaul gameplay and graphics
item.description: Ubisoft has announced Rainbow Six Siege X, an upcoming update for the first-person tactical shooter that will see " major upgrades all around".
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Social Security chief steps down over DOGE access to recipient data: Reports
item.description: The Social Security Administration’s acting leader stepped down from her role over requests from the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) to access recipient data, according to several reports.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: The unbearable lateness of Apple Intelligence
item.description: Apple has apparently delayed what is arguably its most important Apple Intelligence feature, contextual intelligence, by at least another month. It’s the latest chapter in what history will remember as the company’s most painfully slow, yet strategically significant, introduction yet.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump and EU Commission set course for confrontation on big tech
item.description: width="2193" height="1234" sizes="(max-width: 2193px) 100vw, 2193px">With the second Trump administration, very different cultures are once again clashing in the transatlantic relationship. rawf8 – shutterstock.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: New iPhone SE 4 leak suggests it won't match the iPhone 16 in one key area
item.description: Apple is rumored to be putting its own 5G modem in the iPhone SE 4, which may lag behind the Snapdragon equivalent.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Seen those complaints online about having to sign in to your Microsoft account to use Windows 11’s Notepad app? It’s all a load of hot air
item.description: Windows 11 users don’t need a Microsoft account to use Notepad after its latest update – but you will need to login to use the app’s new AI feature.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 8 reasons your cloud costs are too high
item.description: Nobody wants to waste money on cloud services. But by failing to fully address a handful of basic issues, many IT leaders squander funds on cloud services that could be used to support other important projects and initiatives — especially as AI comes along to alter the cloud economics equation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Serverless was never a cure-all
item.description: An obituary for serverless computing might read something like this: In loving memory of serverless computing, born from the fervent hopes of developers and cloud architects alike.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 3 reasons to consider a data security posture management platform
item.description: A week rarely goes by without a major data security breach. Recent news includes a breach impacting an energy company’s 8 million customers, another compromising the information on 450,000 current and former students, and one more exposing 240,000 credit union members.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Lessons in sustainability: What colleges can teach workplaces
item.description: The Fast Company Impact Council is a private membership community of influential leaders, experts, executives, and entrepreneurs who share their insights with our audience. Members pay annual membership dues for access to peer learning and thought leadership opportunities, events and more.
item.dc:creator: Honghao Deng, Fast Company

item.title: A top Chinese official tours Thai-Myanmar border to highlight crackdown on scam centers
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Efforts to shut down online scam centers in Myanmar appeared to gain momentum on Monday as a top Chinese security official visited both sides of the Thai-Myanmar border ahead of expected large-scale repatriations of workers in the illicit industry.
item.dc:creator: JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Snowflake announces preview of Cortex Agent APIs to power enterprise data intelligence
item.description: Snowflake on Wednesday announced the public preview of Cortex Agents, a set of APIs built on top of the Snowflake Intelligence platform, a low-code offering that was first launched in November at Build, the company’s annual developer conference.
item.dc:creator: Info World
